query: SELECT id, title, SUBSTRING(content, 1, 2000) as content_preview FROM articles WHERE status = 'published' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mexMZK3NDs3KsAz.c9d58c93f039 --database RymVrvaM7i66nf7Xs2w9Hu --execute SELECT id, title, SUBSTRING(content, 1, 2000) as content_preview FROM articles WHERE status = 'published' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
